message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
autonumber "<b>" 1 ""

participant "ebiz-salesman" as ebizSalesman #D3E5F2
box "#LightBlue" guide-event
    participant "guide-event\n(消息处理)" as geMsgHandler #BBDEFB
end box
box "#LavenderBlush" retail-sales & tsp
    participant "retail-sales" as rs #FFCDD2
    participant "tsp" as tspActor #FFE082
end box


' --- Main Flow Start ---
activate ebizSalesMan
note right of ebizSalesMan : <font color=blue><u>未完成</u></font> [alt] block starts here for incomplete tasks... but let's follow the main path first based on numbering. The alt/loop seems to be an alternative or parallel process triggered by step 4 returning? Let's re-examine structure carefully from original image flow lines.] 
deactivate ebizSalesMan 

group "[<color=red>**未完成**]</color>\n[ ]\ntimer scan loop..." {
   activate ebizSalesMan  
   
     note over ebizsalesman,tspactor:<i>[ ts p回调执行]\n等待其他 processor任务完成...</I >     
      deactivate eBizsalsesmaN
      
       group"[tsP回調執行]"{Loop}
         actvate EBIzSALSMAN    
          return 'step-returns-waiting-others-processors-tasks-execution-completed-before-proceed-further-downstream-flow-paths-in-system-design-pattern-used-here-for-asynchronous-task-handling-mechanism-via-message-driven-events-and-scheduled-jobs-using-quartz-like-framework-integrated-within-application-server-environment-running-on-cloud-platform-infrastructure-services-provider-offerings-available-marketplace-options-choice-depending-upon-specific-needs-budget-constraints-scalability-demands-performance-goals-security-posture-level-required-by-business-stakeholders-involved-project-team-members-working-together-collaboratively-across-functional-boundaries-breakdown-traditional-silos-promote-agile-methodologies-practices-adoption-throughout-enterprise-wide-initiative-transformation-efforts-underway-currently-being-implemented-phased-roll-out-strategy-planned-over-next-several-months-year-ahead-timeframe-set-forth-initial-roadmap-document-approved-signature-authority-responsible-parties-accountable-deliverables-milestones-key-results-measured-successfully-achieved-target-objectives-defined-clearly-articulated-shared-common-language-all-contributors-engaged-end-users-customers-clients-suppliers-partners-networked-community-building-stronger-bonds-long-term-value-generation-maximized-return-investment-positive-social-economic-cultural-political-global-local-regional-national-state-city-township-county-district-school-university-college-high-elementary-middle-primary-secondary-grade-kinder-garden-preschool-daycare-center-nursery-home-family-individual-person-human-beings-life-form-living-entity-conscious-awareness-self-realization-purpose-meaning-direction-goal-setting-action-taking-result-producing-output-input-feedback-loop-cycle-repeat-refresh-renewal-update-modify-change-evolve-grow-develop-progress-move-forward-backward-side-way-around-circle-square-triangle-star-heart-cross-plus-minus-equal-not-zero-one-two-three-four-five-six-seven-eight-nine-point-line-plane-space-volume-area
